name: Homemade Taco Seasoning Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a storage container with a tight-fitting lid, combine all ingredients.
2. Mix well until evenly distributed.
3. Seal the container tightly.
4. Store in a cool, dry place for up to 6 months.
Makes approximately 1/2 cup (21 teaspoons).
Note: Seven teaspoons of this mix equals about 1.25 oz of purchased taco seasoning mix. Cumin, an herb ground from cumin seeds, has no substitute and is essential for the flavor.
